items.reasoning: Double tangoes sustain through Arc Lightning + Dragon Slave harass in a heavy magic damage lane.
Emergency HP recovery if caught by Laguna Blade or Finger of Death combo at level 6.
Cheap +2 all stats for last-hit contests; builds into Magic Wand later.
Guarantees last hits under Arc Lightning spam; AM needs uninterrupted farm.
Zeus Arc Lightning + Lina Dragon Slave generate 6-8 charges per minute. Best 450g investment in this lane.
Tread-switch to INT for Blink mana cost, STR for surviving burst combos. Core mobility.
Passive HP regen sustains between burst combos; builds into Battlefury.
Farm accelerator that doubles farming speed. Target 15-17 min timing to outpace Zeus tempo.
Dispels Lina Flame Cloak root and creates illusions that burn mana. Splits push pressure.
35% evasion is pure scaling -- Zeus and Lina deal spell damage, so no MKB threat. +35 agi multiplies AM.
2-second BKB-piercing stun locks Zeus for Mana Void. Also blocks physical damage instances.
4000+ HP pool makes AM unkillable between fights. Passive regen negates poke from Arc Lightning.
If Zeus + Lina combo can burst through Mana Shield, BKB gives 6-10s of uninterrupted fighting.
Blocks single-target Laguna Blade initiation; also provides mana regen for Blink spam.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Survive the heavy magic burst lane with regen and Wand charges. Rush Battlefury for flash-farming, then Manta to dispel and burn mana pools. Late game, AM's Mana Void punishes Zeus and Lina's massive mana pools for 1000+ damage teamfight combos.
